option.name: requestToText
option.value:
<CachedHttpClientTabRequests> <entry key="64f81c4cc318e77a768a0ebdcd465feb809b7265" value="###
POST http://localhost:8081/api/v1/orders
Content-Type: application/json

{
 "userId": 0,
 "orderLines": []
}" /> <entry key="4b8f86ec23eeee8024900818e6eff3a9f06402e9" value="###
DELETE http://localhost:8081/api/v1/orders/{{id}}" /> <entry key="c43f31bc3e3413e4aca7a39c39dfa9f89899daa0" value="###
GET http://localhost:8081/api/v1/orders/{{orderId}}" /> <entry key="6f14d8727d282acecff7bf8dc12e264dcb8699b4" value="###
GET http://localhost:8081/api/v1/orders/user/{{userId}}" /> <entry key="aaa1cf3dbcaba433bdda2b3793af03ac82e335b4" value="###
PUT http://localhost:8081/api/v1/orders/{{id}}/status
Content-Type: application/json

""" /> <entry key="bb6bb8788cc6e7b2815c1a4c08c463c50467c468" value="###
GET http://localhost:8081/api/v1/orders" /> <entry key="f59d1baf47096322c50cbfd7b7683edd845b863d" value="###
POST http://localhost:8082/api/v1/payments/create-payment-intent
Content-Type: application/json

{
 "orderId": 0,
 "amount": 0,
 "paymentMethod": ""
}" /> <entry key="123f1a41b58a92f5021a854d0d2f5d6a888fa9cd" value="###
GET http://localhost:8081/api/v1/orders/{{orderId}}/details" /> </CachedHttpClientTabRequests>
